review: I recently sold my home unrepresented. Even though it was a FSBO, I paid to list it on the MLS to attract buyers. Lylene Johnson brought me buyers and represented only them, but she was fair and professional to both sides throughout the entire transaction. I've worked in banking for years so I know what's typical in a real estate transaction. Lylene did a good job of representing her buyers, after the home inspection they negotiated, and made reasonable requests. At the signing of the purchase and sale agreement, Lylene gave everyone a calendar with all of our deadlines noted. As the transaction progressed, everything was done on time and we even closed a week early! The entire sale was handled very professionally by all parties involved. One thing to note though, I think the address on yelp is wrong. The Johnson team is with the Muljat goup on Lakeway Dr.
